name: Miniature Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Split and toast English muffins conventionally.
2. Spread a heaping teaspoon of tomato sauce on each toasted English muffin half. Arrange Mozzarella cheese pieces on muffin halves.
3. Place 6 muffin halves at a time on a heat-resistant, non-metallic serving platter that has been covered with a paper or cloth napkin.
4. Heat uncovered in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until cheese begins to melt and becomes bubbly.
5. Spread a little additional tomato sauce on each muffin half. Sprinkle with oregano and grated cheese.
6. Arrange garnish on tops of pizzas as desired and heat uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 30 to 45 seconds or until cheese is completely melted and garnishes are hot.
7. Cut each pizza into individual hors d'oeuvres as desired.
8. Serve hot.
